subject: Re: Mort Zuckerman
body:
thank you for your response...  I  would prefer to
speak with you. in person...  I  have a few questions
that I would like to go over with you....  for ex..  
why pay maer one penny.... why the urgent need for
money if there are readily salable assets.. i have
asked for a breakdown of how , if i understand
correctly , you and i spenta total of  ten million
dollars, in one year, where the proposed budget was to
take us to breakeven,, over three years,, the revenue
shortfall was only , one million,,and the financial
controls , according to maer( I obviously have to
discount what he says} were totally out of his
hands..and in the hands of your very experinced
people. AS I have previously asked,, how is the size
of this 
'expense" more than triple , other ventures, I can
promise you that you  that this will be resolved to
your satisfaction, IT can be done as soon as your
people provide me , seperate from maers comp. which I
think ridicoulous,, wiht the breakdown of 9.5.million
dollars gone... HAve fun in isreal... thanks for the
birthday message..... ...p.s.  your emails do not come
to me directly , so I just got them this morning,,,, 
--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> Dear Jeffrey:
> 
> Your office tells me that it is your birthday
> weekend, so I want to wish you
> a happy birthday!
> 
> I will be in Israel next week and I fervently hope
> that you will respond to
> the financial end costs of Radar next week because
> it is really not right to
> leave these people hanging.  I have put in the
> additional funds and I am
> assuming that you will do the same. If you have any
> other intentions I think
> you owe it to me to let me know.
> 
> Best regards,
> 
> Mort
> 
> _______________________________________

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Dear Jeffrey:

Your office tells me that it is your birthday
weekend, so I want to wish you
a happy birthday!

I will be in Israel next week and I fervently hope
that you will respond to
the financial end costs of Radar next week because
it is really not right to
leave these people hanging. I have put in the
additional funds and I am
assuming that you will do the same. If you have any
other intentions I think
you owe it to me to let me know.

Best regards,

Mort
